settings.heading: A structured warranty page for policy, claims, and escalation clarity
settings.copy: Use this page for warranty coverage, claim expectations, and how customers should move from support into service.
settings.support_note: Warranty pages should clarify what is covered, what information is needed, and when support should be contacted first.

settings.heading: Explain coverage, process, and next steps
settings.copy: Use these cards for coverage highlights, required claim information, and escalation order.

settings.title: What the warranty is intended to cover
settings.copy: Use this card for concise policy summaries and exclusions.

settings.title: What customers should prepare before filing
settings.copy: Use this card for purchase proof, serial numbers, or required issue detail.

settings.title: When support should be contacted first
settings.copy: Use this card when troubleshooting or compatibility review should happen before service escalation.

settings.intro_copy: Use the page body for the actual warranty policy, regional notes, or formal coverage language.
settings.side_heading: Use a side card for the practical claim route
settings.side_copy: Direct customers into contact or troubleshooting depending on how you want the claim flow handled.

settings.heading: Some warranty questions should resolve through support before service
settings.copy: Use this CTA for pre-claim troubleshooting, compatibility review, or direct help.
